title: Design learner sensitivity ladder after fixed-subset training-noise audit
rationale: Phase 1 requires learner sensitivity audit before widening downstream search or feature intervention branches.

rule.name: Design learner sensitivity ladder after fixed-subset training-noise audit
rule.hypothesis: If fixed-subset multi-seed noise remains comparable to the global floor, the next priority is to audit whether the learner itself is insufficiently sensitive to composition changes.
rule.rationale: Phase 1 requires learner sensitivity audit before widening downstream search or feature intervention branches.
